description: pivot_table aggfunc='mean'→'count' changes what values are computed

_meta.explanation: aggfunc='count' counts the number of non-NaN values in each group. Group 'x' has 2 entries, group 'y' has 1 entry.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 2. Tests understanding of aggregation function semantics.
